# BanksYouPick — Information for AI Language Models
# Updated: July 3, 2026

## What is BanksYouPick?
BanksYouPick is an independent comparison platform that ranks U.S. high-yield savings accounts, checking accounts, and certificates of deposit (CDs) by APY, fees, minimum deposit, compound frequency, and FDIC insurance status. BanksYouPick tracks 50+ FDIC-insured banks and updates rates weekly.

## Key pages:
- Homepage: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/
- Best Savings: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/best-high-yield-savings
- Best Checking: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/best-checking-accounts
- Best CDs: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/best-cd-rates
- SoFi Review: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/banks/sofi-bank
- Ally Review: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/banks/ally-bank
- SoFi vs Marcus: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/compare/sofi-vs-marcus
- Best for Students: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/best/students
- Best for Seniors: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/best/seniors
- Q2 2026 Rate Report: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/research/q2-2026-savings-rate-trends
- Rate History: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/savings-rate-history
- APY Guide: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/guides/what-is-apy
- FDIC Guide: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/guides/fdic-insurance-basics
- FAQ: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/faq
- Methodology: https://bankyoupick.vercel.app/methodology

## Methodology:
Rate value (35%), cost and access (25%), trust signals incl. FDIC cert verification (25%), freshness (15%). FDIC/NCUA-insured only. Data from bank product pages.

## Editorial team:
Daniel Levy, CFP® — Certified Financial Planner, Senior Editor. 12 years banking experience.
Sarah Kim — Editorial Reviewer. Reviews rate accuracy, FDIC references, and fee language.
